name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, shortening, brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, corn syrup, water, and vanilla in a large bowl until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the oats and raisins.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
